title: Forms/SuperForm
excerpt: I’m going crazy trying to find a way to insert an input table within a form. It doesn’t appear to be an option in Workform, or SuperForm. I’ve tried playing around with Jotforms but tying individual table cells to a spec…

posts.author: jmifsud (Joseph Mifsud)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m going crazy trying to find a way to insert an input table within a form. It doesn’t appear to be an option in Workform, or SuperForm. I’ve tried playing around with Jotforms but tying individual table cells to a specific column doesn’t seem possible. This can’t be that difficult… PLEASE HELP!

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jmifsud

The way I understand forms is that each form inserts an item into a table. Are you trying to condense the process of inserting multiple records in a single form? What is your use case?
